archivedItemsHelp: Items that were archived automatically or manually deleted. Restoring returns them to your regular inventory list.
autoArchiveHelp: When enabled, items that have been expired for the configured number of days are automatically archived (soft-deleted) when you open the dashboard
categoryInUse: Cannot delete: this category is used by existing items
deleteTagConfirm: Delete this tag? It will be removed from all items.
duplicateCategoryName: A category with this name already exists
duplicateLocationName: A location with this name already exists
expiryWarningDaysHelp: Days before expiry to show warning
invalidAutoArchiveDays: Archive days must be between 1 and 365
invalidWarningDays: Warning days must be between 1 and 30
locationInUse: Cannot delete: this location is used by existing items
nameTooLong: Name must be between 1 and 40 characters
title: Settings
